sourceSamples.text: Printing, in the only sense with which we are at present concerned, differs from most if not from all the arts and crafts represented in the Exhibition
For although the Chinese took impressions from wood blocks engraved in relief for centuries before the woodcutters of the Netherlands, by a similar process
